title: Generated .mk files need to add $(LDFLAGS) for shared lib targets
body:
In the make_protect_lib example, a makefile `Vsecret_impl.mk` is created by the following command:

```
verilator -cc -x-assign fast -Wall -CFLAGS -DVL_TIME_CONTEXT --protect-lib verilated_secret -Mdir obj_dir_secret/ secret_impl.v
```

The shared library target in the filenis as follows:
```
libverilated_secret.so: $(VK_OBJS) $(VK_USER_OBJS) $(VK_GLOBAL_OBJS) verilated_secret.o $(VM_HIER_LIBS)
ifeq ($(shell uname -s),Darwin)
	$(OBJCACHE) $(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) $(CPPFLAGS) $(OPT_FAST) -undefined dynamic_lookup -shared -flat_namespace -o $@ $^
else
	$(OBJCACHE) $(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) $(CPPFLAGS) $(OPT_FAST) -shared -o $@ $^
endif
```

It would be better to add `$(LDFLAGS)` after `-shared` option to be able to add hardening flags
code_blocks:
verilator -cc -x-assign fast -Wall -CFLAGS -DVL_TIME_CONTEXT --protect-lib verilated_secret -Mdir obj_dir_secret/ secret_impl.v
libverilated_secret.so: $(VK_OBJS) $(VK_USER_OBJS) $(VK_GLOBAL_OBJS) verilated_secret.o $(VM_HIER_LIBS)
ifeq ($(shell uname -s),Darwin)
	$(OBJCACHE) $(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) $(CPPFLAGS) $(OPT_FAST) -undefined dynamic_lookup -shared -flat_namespace -o $@ $^
else
	$(OBJCACHE) $(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) $(CPPFLAGS) $(OPT_FAST) -shared -o $@ $^
endif
